case_title: VALDEZ-MADRANOS, CARMEN et al VS BROWN, CONNIE LEE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, LORETTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROWN, CONNIE LEE JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 27765 ON 1/5/05. DECLARATION RE ZIP CODE FILED. ADDRESS FOR DEFT.
